label: Transform
description: Apply map, filter, reduce, or extract operations to the input using sandboxed JavaScript expressions.

settings.name: transformExpression
settings.label: Expression
settings.description: JS expression. Variables: `input` (current item), `item` (alias for map/filter), `index`, `acc` (for reduce). Return value used as output.

ai.shortDescription: Map, filter, reduce, or extract data with a JS expression.
ai.whenToUse: When you need to reshape an array or extract a specific field from the upstream output before passing it to the next node.
ai.examplePrompt: filter the list to only include items where status === 'active'
ai.promptHints: Use `input` to refer to each element (map/filter/reduce) or the whole value (extract). `acc` holds the accumulator in reduce. Expressions run sandboxed — no Node.js globals.
